title: Wave 9 - LLM decision, MCP setup, and devnet hardening
goal: Add a bounded, default-off LLM judge for guardrail decision support, an idempotent OpenCode MCP setup script, and devnet-focused hardening: signer env alias, public-key validation, approvalProof bypass, default actorWallet, recipientKnown default, and devnet transfer transaction payload builder.
scoutSources: ../security_agent_middleware README, specs, interceptor app, local_judge runtime, setup scripts

tasks.title: Add LLM decision contracts and sanitizer
evidence: Contracts in llmDecisionContracts.ts: LlmJudgeConfig, LlmJudgeInput, LlmGuardOutput, LlmClampedDecision, LLM_DECISION_STRICTNESS table, LLM_SENSITIVE_KEY_PATTERNS.
Sanitizer in llmDecisionSanitizer.ts: sanitizeLlmJudgeInput redacts sensitive keys, truncates oversized values, handles nested objects, redacts Uint8Array/Buffer/ArrayBuffer.
11 tests pass covering key redaction, nested redaction, truncation, binary values, default context.
acceptanceCriteria: Contracts live separately from behavior.
Sanitizer removes prompts, raw tx bytes, keys, secrets, and oversized values.
Tests cover sensitive field redaction.

tasks.title: Add default-off LLM judge adapter
evidence: resolveLlmConfig reads COMPASS_LLM_* env vars with false default.
isLlmConfigured requires enabled + provider + model + apiKey.
validateLlmGuardOutput validates LlmGuardOutput schema strictly.
clampLlmDecision enforces decision strictness: DENY cannot become ALLOW, ALLOW can tighten to DENY or REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL.
callLlmJudge returns undefined when disabled, unconfigured, unsupported, timeout, or invalid output.
OpenCode Go provider path uses fetch against COMPASS_LLM_BASE_URL with chat completions payload and model kimi-k2.5 when provider=opencode-go and no providerFn is injected.
OpenAI remains supported as a secondary provider path.
37 tests pass covering all adapter behaviors.
No new runtime dependencies added.
acceptanceCriteria: No provider call occurs unless explicitly enabled and configured.
Invalid JSON, schema mismatch, and timeout preserve deterministic decision.
LLM output cannot loosen deterministic decisions.

tasks.title: Attach LLM decision metadata after deterministic gateway evaluation
evidence: enrichWithLlmMetadata called after transferGateway, swapGateway, and conditionalGateway evaluations.
When COMPASS_LLM_DECISION_ENABLED is unset/false, enrichWithLlmMetadata returns undefined and no LLM call is attempted.
Deterministic DENY is preserved even when LLM is enabled - clampLlmDecision enforces this.
LLM metadata (llmConsulted, llmDecision, llmClamped) audited in audit events when LLM is consulted.
4 router tests cover LLM-disabled fallback, enabled-but-unconfigured fallback, current behavior with no config, and LLM audit metadata with mocked OpenAI fetch.
All 28 router tests pass.
acceptanceCriteria: Deterministic DENY remains DENY.
LLM metadata is audited when used.
Missing LLM config keeps current behavior.

tasks.title: Add OpenCode MCP install script
evidence: scripts/install-opencode-mcp.mjs supports --dry-run, idempotent writes, preserves $schema and instructions, creates timestamped backup, never writes secrets.
package.json has mcp:install:opencode script.
npm run mcp:install:opencode -- --dry-run prints planned config without writing.
Full run preserves existing config, creates backup, writes correct mcp.compass shape.
Idempotent second run detects correct existing config and reports it.
docs/wave-9-llm-mcp-setup/opencode-setup.md explains restart requirement, dry-run, env vars, and troubleshooting.
acceptanceCriteria: Script supports --dry-run and idempotent writes.
Script preserves existing .opencode/opencode.json fields.
Script creates backup before writing and never writes secrets.

tasks.title: Add MCP env loader and COMPASS_LLM_API_KEY support
evidence: loadRepoEnv.ts: tiny local .env loader - no dotenv dependency. Loads repo-root .env at MCP stdio startup, never overrides existing process.env, masks secrets in logs, idempotent.
mcpServer.ts: calls loadRepoEnv() before startCompassMcpStdioServer so COMPASS_LLM_* vars are available.
COMPASS_LLM_* vars documented in .env.example (root only; back/.env.example consolidated into root).
opencode-setup.md updated: documents automatic .env loading at MCP startup and the COMPASS_LLM_API_KEY variable.
18 tests pass for loadRepoEnv (parse + load + secret masking + idempotency + COMPASS_LLM_* vars).
acceptanceCriteria: MCP runtime loads repo .env when started via npm run mcp:dev without dotenv.
Existing process.env values are never overridden.
Secret values are not logged.
COMPASS_LLM_API_KEY is documented in .env.example.
COMPASS_LLM_BASE_URL defaults to https://opencode.ai/zen/go/v1/chat/completions.

tasks.title: Add signer env alias COMPASS_LOCAL_SIGNER_SECRET_KEY and public-key validation
evidence: resolveSecretKeyFromEnv now accepts COMPASS_LOCAL_SIGNER_SECRET_KEY as an alias for COMPASS_LOCAL_SIGNER_SECRET_KEY_B58 (both are base58-encoded secret keys).
matchesConfiguredPublicKey validates COMPASS_LOCAL_SIGNER_PUBLIC_KEY against the derived keypair address when set; returns LOCAL_SIGNER_PUBLIC_KEY_MISMATCH if they differ.
signerAdapterContracts.ts extended with LOCAL_SIGNER_PUBLIC_KEY_MISMATCH error reason.
3 new signer tests: base58 alias accepted, matching public key passes, mismatched public key fails with LOCAL_SIGNER_PUBLIC_KEY_MISMATCH.
COMPASS_LOCAL_SIGNER_SECRET_KEY and COMPASS_LOCAL_SIGNER_PUBLIC_KEY added to .env.example.
acceptanceCriteria: Signer accepts COMPASS_LOCAL_SIGNER_SECRET_KEY env var as base58 alias.
When COMPASS_LOCAL_SIGNER_PUBLIC_KEY is set, it must match the derived key; mismatch returns LOCAL_SIGNER_PUBLIC_KEY_MISMATCH.
When COMPASS_LOCAL_SIGNER_PUBLIC_KEY is absent, the check is skipped (backwards-compatible).

tasks.title: Add devnet-only approvalProof bypass and audit tracking
evidence: ExecuteApprovedActionInput.approvalProof changed from required to optional (type OnchainActionApprovalProof | undefined).
execute_approved_action input schema: approvalProof removed from required array; only candidateId and transactionPayload required. Description notes 'Optional only for local devnet demo execution.'
parseExecuteApprovedActionInput: on devnet, missing approvalProof does not return MISSING_APPROVAL_PROOF; on testnet/mainnet, it still does.
validateApprovalProofBinding: returns ok when approvalProof is absent and network is devnet.
pendingTransactionStore records Compass-built payloads and consumes them before allowing devnet proof bypass.
handleExecuteApprovedActionTool: devnetApprovalBypassed boolean tracks whether approvalProof was omitted on devnet; included in all audit events.
Router tests cover devnet missing approvalProof with pending payload, arbitrary payload denial, mismatched payload denial, and testnet proof requirement.
acceptanceCriteria: Devnet allows execute_approved_action without approvalProof only for Compass-built pending payloads.
Testnet and mainnet still require approvalProof.
All audit events include devnetApprovalBypassed boolean.
approvalProof binding validation skips on devnet when absent, but pending payload validation still prevents arbitrary signing.

tasks.title: Default actorWallet from local signer and recipientKnown to false
evidence: applyDefaultActorWallet helper: when actorWallet is omitted, resolves the local signer address and fills it in; falls back to the original input if signer is unavailable.
transfer, swap, and conditional handlers all apply default actorWallet before gateway evaluation.
GUARDED_TRANSFER_SOL schema: actorWallet now optional with description 'Optional source wallet. In local-signer demo mode Compass uses the configured signer wallet when omitted.'
recipientKnown defaults to false when omitted (changed from undefined to boolean false).
GUARDED_TRANSFER_SOL description updated: 'Do not ask the user for source wallet in local-signer demo mode; Compass uses the configured signer wallet.'
Router test: verifies omitted actorWallet resolves to signer's public key and omitted recipientKnown defaults to false.
acceptanceCriteria: Omitted actorWallet resolves to local signer address.
Omitted recipientKnown defaults to false (unknown recipient).
Gateway receives the resolved wallet in all cases.

tasks.title: Add devnet transfer transaction payload builder
evidence: buildSolTransferTransactionPayload: builds unsigned VersionedTransaction for SOL transfer on devnet; rejects non-devnet networks with TRANSFER_PAYLOAD_UNSUPPORTED_NETWORK.
Types in transferTransactionPayloadTypes.ts: BuildSolTransferTransactionPayloadInput and BuildSolTransferTransactionPayloadResult with typed error reasons.
buildTransferResultData now returns executionPayload with unsigned transaction when decision is ALLOW or REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL and actorWallet is resolved.
When payload build fails or actorWallet unavailable, result includes executionPayloadStatus: 'unavailable' with reason.
2 tests: devnet payload with blockhash mock (verifies base64 encoding, action hash, account keys), mainnet rejection with TRANSFER_PAYLOAD_UNSUPPORTED_NETWORK.
acceptanceCriteria: Devnet SOL transfers produce unsigned VersionedTransaction payloads.
Non-devnet networks return TRANSFER_PAYLOAD_UNSUPPORTED_NETWORK.
Transfer result data includes executionPayload when available.

tasks.title: Validate Wave 9
evidence: npm run test:back: 245/245 tests pass.
npm run lint: 0 errors (1 pre-existing warning in app/layout.tsx).
npx tsc --noEmit: clean compile.
npm run mcp:install:opencode -- --dry-run: prints planned config without writing.
acceptanceCriteria: Focused and full tests pass.
Dry-run installer prints planned config without writing.
Docs explain OpenCode restart requirement.
